description: Brent crude spikes and creates imported-inflation pressure across Indian markets.

required_inputs.label: Is shipping / logistics disruption also involved?

situation_template: Brent crude has climbed to USD {brent_price_usd} after {shock_text}, with a one-day move of {one_day_spike_percent}%. {rupee_text} {shipping_text}{opec_text}{inflation_risk_text}
round_events: Round 1 (0-2 hours): Energy, aviation, and transport-sensitive names react first while inflation concerns push traders into defensive positioning.
Round 2 (2-12 hours): Analysts begin marking up fuel, freight, and imported-input assumptions across chemicals, auto, and consumption sectors.
Round 3 (12-72 hours): The market starts pricing second-order effects through inflation, currency pressure, and policy-response expectations.
default_actions: track follow-through in chemicals and auto
